title: Get Element by ID
description: Select an HTML element from the page using its unique ID.
problemStatement:
Interaction starts with selection! Imagine a page with `

Title

`. Use `document.getElementById("title")` to select it and store it in a variable called `el`. Print `el`. **Requirement:** This code usually runs in a browser script.
hints: The DOM (Document Object Model) is a tree of HTML elements.
